title: fraxinus cuspidata
intro: Fraxinus cuspidata, also known as Manchurian ash, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia, characterized by its broad leaves and compound leaflets. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus cuspidata lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Fraxinus cuspidata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
